title: anthemis triumfetti subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Anthemis triumfetti subsp. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis triumfetta, a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and calming effects, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in apigenin and luteolin, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of Pyrenean chamomile include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
